message:
feat(bubbletea): add TaskTracker and CancellationToken integration tests

Add comprehensive tests for async task coordination (bd-2i18):
- test_task_tracker_spawn_blocking_tracks_thread: Verify spawn_blocking
  tasks complete before wait() returns
- test_cancellation_token_stops_blocking_task: Verify token propagation
- Additional RwLock safety tests for demo_showcase

Dependencies:
- Add tokio-util with sync feature to bubbletea/Cargo.toml

Also includes glamour syntax.rs and benchmark updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
